sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ لَيْلَى أَنْ تَفْتَحَ مَشْرُوعَهَا الْخَاصَّ الصَّغِيرَ.
sentences.translation: Lejla je odlučila da otvori svoj mali privatni projekat.
sentences.translationEn: Layla decided to open her own small private project.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَبِيعُ الْمَلَابِسَ الْمَصْنُوعَةَ يَدَوِيًّا عَبْرَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Ona prodaje ručno rađenu odjeću putem interneta.
sentences.translationEn: She sells handmade clothes via the internet.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَتْ مَهَارَاتِ التَّسْوِيقِ لِتَجْذِبَ عُمَلَاءَ جُدُدًا.
sentences.translation: Naučila je vještine marketinga kako bi privukla nove klijente.
sentences.translationEn: She learned marketing skills to attract new customers.

sentences.arabic: الْعَمَلُ الْحُرُّ يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى صَبْرٍ وَكَثِيرٍ مِنَ الِاجْتِهَادِ.
sentences.translation: Samostalni rad zahtijeva strpljenje i mnogo truda.
sentences.translationEn: Freelancing needs patience and a lot of diligence.
